name: Moist Poached Salmon- Second Time Around
recipeInstructions:
(Start with 4 steaks so you have enough for the next day, second time around).
1. Arrange salmon steaks in a single layer on the bottom of a shallow skillet wide enough to accommodate them without crowding.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add enough white wine and water to completely cover the salmon; add peppercorns.
4. Slowly bring liquid to a simmer over medium-low heat.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and continue simmering until the top of the salmon looks opaque (about 2-3 minutes).
6. Turn off the heat and let stand covered for 10 minutes or until other parts of your meal are completely cooked.
7. Remove 2 salmon steaks from the poaching liquid and blot both sides with paper towels.
8. Top with tomato sauce.
9. Leave the remaining steaks in the liquid to cool to room temperature, then remove and refrigerate, covered for the next day.
Yield: 2 servings
